_comment3: This file tests the Merge Engine. It contains:
_comment4: 1. A 'replace' override for race_human: completely replaces the
_comment5: test_mock version (removes bonus feat, adds +2 INT instead).
_comment6: 2. A 'partial' override for class_fighter: adds a new level 4
_comment7: progression entry + a new tag, WITHOUT touching levels 1-3.
_comment8: 3. A 'partial' override for feat_cleave: removes the STR prerequisite
_comment11: To test: enable BOTH 'test_mock' AND 'test_override' in enabledRuleSources.
_comment12: test_override should be listed AFTER test_mock (higher priority).

_comment2: This completely REPLACES race_human from test_mock.
_comment3: Expected result: race_human has NO bonus feat slot, but has +2 INT bonus.
_comment4: This proves 'replace' semantics: ALL original data is discarded.

description.en: A REPLACED Human race for override testing. This version grants +2 INT instead of a bonus feat. The original bonus feat and skill point bonus are completely removed (replace semantics).
description.fr: Une race Humaine REMPLACÉE pour les tests d'override. Cette version accorde +2 INT au lieu d'un don supplémentaire.

_comment2: This PARTIALLY merges into class_fighter from test_mock.
_comment5: - A NEW level 4 entry is ADDED to the levelProgression.
_comment6: - The tag 'homebrew_variant' is APPENDED to the tags array.
_comment7: - Nothing else changes (partial merge preserves existing data).

_comment: === TEST 3: PARTIAL merge on feat_cleave with -prefix deletion ===
_comment4: - The 'homebrew' tag is ADDED to the tags array.
_comment5: - The existing prerequisite 'feat_power_attack' conditionNode is REPLACED
_comment6: (prerequisitesNode is always fully replaced in partial merge).
_comment7: - The 'fighter_bonus_feat' tag is REMOVED via -prefix deletion.

prerequisitesNode.errorMessage: Requires Strength 13+ (Homebrew: Power Attack prerequisite removed)

_comment: === TEST 4: NEW entity from test_override source ===
_comment2: This is a brand new feat that only exists in the test_override source.
_comment3: It should only be available when test_override is in enabledRuleSources.
_comment4: It demonstrates that entities from an override source layer are NEW content,
_comment5: not just modifications of existing content.

description.en: A homebrew improved version of Toughness. Grants +5 HP instead of the standard +3. This feat only exists when the test_override rule source is enabled.
description.fr: Une version améliorée homebrew de Robustesse. Accorde +5 PV au lieu des +3 standard. Ce don n'existe que lorsque la source de règles test_override est activée.
